description:
Do things with utmost efficiency

Kando is an open source pie menu for your desktop. It offers an unconventional, fast, highly efficient, and fun way of interacting with your computer! You can use it to launch applications, simulate keyboard shortcuts, open files, and much more.
Kando now supports keyboard navigation and brings an IPC API that allows you to control Kando from external applications! This opens up a lot of possibilities for integration with other tools and custom workflows!
- ▶️ Release Video on YouTube
- 💬 Join our Discord server
- 📝 Read the changelog
A special shout-out to all the ❤️ sponsors, translators, and @elfi-ox, @yar2000T, @make-42, @radmorecameron, @Haruto-works333, @pgoslatara, and @AurelienJt for their contributions to this version!
🌸 Have Fun! 🌸
